creator: dcb314@hotmail.com
text:
[usr/src/sbin/ipfw/dummynet.c:1306]: (style) Same expression on both sides of '||'.

Source code is

        if (v[1] < v[0] ||
            v[1] >= DN_MAX_ID-1 ||
            v[1] >= DN_MAX_ID-1) {
            continue; /* invalid entry */

Maybe

        if (v[1] < v[0] ||
            v[0] >= DN_MAX_ID-1 ||
            v[1] >= DN_MAX_ID-1) {
            continue; /* invalid entry */
